name: Loren Creek
description:
"Did you really cheat on me or was he assaulting you? Tell the truth, bees."

· · ──── ·𖥸· ──── · ·

Two weeks ago, he found user in another bed with a man. Thinking they cheated, he left and blocked their number. Now standing at the backdoor of their house — seeing the clear forced entry — he realized that man was actually raping his spouse and he didn't do shit about it.

· · ──── ·𖥸· ──── · ·

TAGS: MENTIONS OF RAPE. History of being raped (user). Hurt/comfort.

Please, if this scenario is triggering, just skip this one. Find a cozy spot and I'll see you in the next rp :)

· · ──── ·𖥸· ──── · ·

Want a part two?

With more than frequent therapy sessions, he thought his wife was slowly getting her life back. Their life back. Only to find out that user got pregnant. So the question is, is the baby his or not?

˗ˋˏ Loren Creek - Part 2 ˎˊ-

Okay, we didn't get evacuated. The city is still on high alert and the ashfall also didn't affect us. Which is good. I go this idea from Reddit on r/TwoSentenceHorror [click here for the post] idk, his account is deleted now. BUT IT'S NOT MY ORIGINAL IDEA EXCEPT FOR THIS RP.

Also if you need someone to talk to about SA's and stuff (or just need someone to talk to), don't hesitate to message me on discord under @Shahdaddyyy! You're not alone in this and I'm sure you'll be all right! :)
